goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'caribbean' food and should be in the 'south'.
The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'indian' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel should be in the 'same price range as the restaurant' and should be 'in the same area as the restaurant'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'restaurant' by '23:45'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve caribbean food and should be in the south
The restaurant should be in the expensive price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves indian food
Make sure you get address and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel should be in the same price range as the restaurant and should be in the same area as the restaurant
Make sure you get whether they have internet
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the restaurant by 23:45
Make sure you get contact number and car type
